song_name: I Wish It Would Rain Down

I Wish It Would Rain Down

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: I Wish It Would Rain Down

content:
[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
  
                            
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                    [ch]D[/ch] 
   You know I never meant to see you again[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch] 
But I only passed by as a friend, Yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch] 
   All this time I stayed out of sight[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
I started wondering why.[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch] 
Now I, Oooh now I know I wish it would rain down, down on me[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch] 
Oooh Yes I wish it would rain, rain down on me now[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch] 
Oooh Yes I wish it would rain down, down on me[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]D[/ch] 
Ooh Yes I wish it would rain on me[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                    [ch]D[/ch] 
You said you didn`t need a me in your life,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch] 
Oh I guess you were right. Yeah![/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch] 
Ooh I never meant to cause you no pain[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
But it looks like I did it again. Yeah![/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch] 
Now I, Oooh now I know I wish it would rain down, down on me[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch] 
Oooh Yes I wish it would rain, rain down on me now[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch] 
Oooh Yes I wish it would rain down, down on me[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]D[/ch] 
Ooh Yes I wish it would rain on me[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch] 
   Though your hurt is gone, mine's hanging on, inside[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch] 
And I know, it's eating me through every night and day[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch] 
I'm just waiting on your sign[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch] 
Cause I know, I know  I never meant to cause you no pain[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch] 
And I realize I let you down, Oh![/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
   But I know in my heart of hearts[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                   [ch]Em[/ch]
   I know I'm never gonna hold you again[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch] 
Now I, Oooh now I know I wish it would rain down, down on me[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch] 
Oooh Yes I wish it would rain, rain down on me now[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch] 
Oooh Yes I wish it would rain down, down on me[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]D[/ch] 
Ooh Yes I wish it would rain on me[/tab]
